title: Dashboard Widget - Show time tracking data by people
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m searching for a solution to add a widget on a dashboard, not a diagramm, to show timetracking data by user and by Months. 
Example : 
User1     April   1H30 
User2     April   3h45 
I already have the time track…

posts.author: fdelmas (Florian Delmas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m searching for a solution to add a widget on a dashboard, not a diagramm, to show timetracking data by user and by Months.

Example :
User1 April 1H30
User2 April 3h45

I already have the time tracking data and dates but i canot find a proper way to present tham on a dashboard without a diagramm (cause i’m able to do it with a diagramm but this is not what my boss want).

Thanks for your help

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Florian,

Just to clarify, have you tried our out time tracking widget?

Are you able to clarify the way your boss would like the data presented?

posts.author: fdelmas (Florian Delmas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Yes and it presented the way my boss want it but it’s not working with time tracking sub items as far as i see.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I hear where you’re coming from - transparently, we are quite limited in terms of subitems with our time-tracking functionality. I will pass this feedback onto our internal team.

That said, can I ask if you’d consider exploring our apps marketplace? This app is available which you might like to look into:

posts.author: fdelmas (Florian Delmas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Thanks. This time it is not exactly what we are searching for. I’ll continue my testing.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml: @fdelmas @BiancaT Analytics & Reports by Screenful allows reporting time tracking data both on top level items and subitems. You can learn more from this guide: Creating charts based on time tracking data - Screenful Guide for monday.com
